creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Eric Devolder from comment #9)

I'll take things one by one.

There is a bug in the base SSL: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=255277 (Base OpenSSL is missing the symbol EVP_PKEY_meth_get_digestsign in /usr/lib/libcrypto.so) that affected the port.

The workaround line in the port should correct the problem for the port.
